title: Top Funds Rev Up Demand As This Large Cap Eyes Breakout
text: With its relative strength line soaring in a bad market, O'Reilly Automotive nears buy point with strong demand by top funds. The post Top Funds Rev Up Demand As This Large Cap Eyes Breakout appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Nasdaq Bear Market: 2 Unbelievable Stocks You'll Regret Not Buying on the Dip

title: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.63% and 1.16%, respectively, for the quarter ended July 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Copart Reports Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Financial Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) today reported financial results for the quarter and year ended July 31, 2022. For the three months ended July 31, 2022, revenue, gross profit, and net income were $883.4 million, $381.6 million, and $263.7 million, respectively. These represent an increase in revenue of $134.8 million, or 18.0%; an increase in gross profit of $24.1 million, or 6.7%; and an increase in net income of $7.8 million, or 3.0%, respectively, from the same period la
